# Ergonomic Office Chair — ErgoFlex Pro 5000

![ErgoFlex Pro 5000 in charcoal](https://example.com/images/ergoflex-pro-5000.jpg)

## Overview

The ErgoFlex Pro 5000 is a high-back office chair designed for users who sit
8+ hours per day. It features adjustable lumbar support, a breathable mesh
back, and a 12-year warranty on the frame and mechanism.

**Price:** $749.00  
**Colors:** Charcoal, Navy, Sage  
**Weight capacity:** 300 lbs (136 kg)  
**Seat height range:** 16"–20" (41–51 cm)  
**Warranty:** 12 years frame, 5 years fabric, 2 years gas cylinder

## Key features

- **Dynamic lumbar support** that adjusts as you move, maintaining contact
  whether you're leaning forward or reclining.
- **4D armrests** — height, width, depth, and pivot adjustments.
- **Breathable mesh back** rated for 50 000+ hours of use without sagging.
- **Synchro-tilt mechanism** with five lockable positions.
- **Quiet-roll casters** tested on hardwood, carpet, and tile.

## Customer reviews

### ★★★★☆ Great for long workdays

> "I've had this chair for six months and my lower back pain is gone.
> Assembly took about 25 minutes. The armrests are a little wobbly when fully
> extended, but otherwise it's solid."
>
> — Michael T., verified purchase, March 2026

### ★★★★★ Worth every dollar

> "Switched from a $200 chair and the difference is night and day. The mesh
> back keeps me cool even in summer. Customer service replaced a missing screw
> within 48 hours."
>
> — Sarah K., verified purchase, April 2026

### ★★★☆☆ Good chair, confusing instructions

> "The chair itself is great — comfortable, looks professional on video calls.
> But the assembly instructions are just pictures with no text. Took me an hour
> and I had to redo two steps."
>
> — James L., verified purchase, May 2026

## Specifications

| Specification   | Detail                      |
| --------------- | --------------------------- |
| Overall height  | 42"–46" (107–117 cm)        |
| Seat width      | 20" (51 cm)                 |
| Seat depth      | 18"–20" (46–51 cm)          |
| Back height     | 24" (61 cm)                 |
| Base diameter   | 27" (69 cm)                 |
| Chair weight    | 42 lbs (19 kg)              |
| Shipping weight | 52 lbs (24 kg)              |
| Certifications  | ANSI/BIFMA, GREENGUARD Gold |

## Shipping & returns

Free shipping to the contiguous US. Usually ships in 2–3 business days.
30-day return window. Return shipping is free if the chair is defective;
otherwise a $45 return fee applies.
